Invited Talks

We are honoured to host the following invited speakers and panelists.

Judith Rousseau
Professor
Université Paris Dauphine-PSL, France
Bayesian Statistics
Gitta Kutyniok
Professor
Chair of Mathematical Foundations of Artificial Intelligence, LMU Munich, Germany
Mathematical Foundations of AI
Francesco Restuccia
Assistant Professor
Northeastern University, United States
Computer networks
Carlo Cordasco
Assistant Professor
University of Manchester, United Kingdom

The 3rd Workshop on Epistemic Intelligence in Machine Learning

12 December 2026 · Paris, France
